title: String Search Method Selection Flowchart
description: A decision flowchart for selecting the appropriate advanced Java string searching method based on use case requirements.
elements: Start: Need to search a string
relationships: If 'Simple pattern match?' is yes, proceed to 'Need index position?'
If 'Using regular expressions?' is yes, proceed to 'matcher.find()'
If 'Need multiple matches?' is yes, proceed to 'matcher.find()' loop
If 'Need index position?' is no, use 'contains()'; if yes, use 'indexOf()'
